query:
UPDATE ai_knowledge_base_documents 
                SET processing_metadata = jsonb_set(
                    jsonb_set(
                        jsonb_set(
                            COALESCE(processing_metadata, '{}'),
                            '{status}',
                            '"completed"'
                        ),
                        '{chunks_count}',
                        $1::text::jsonb
                    ),
                    '{processed_at}',
                    $2::text::jsonb
                ),
                updated_at = $3
                WHERE id = $4
